headline: Reflecting On Financial Exchanges & Data Stocks’ Q1 Earnings: Nasdaq (NASDAQ:NDAQ)
summary: The end of an earnings season can be a great time to discover new stocks and assess how companies are handling the current business environment. Let’s take a look at how Nasdaq (NASDAQ:NDAQ) and the rest of the financial exchanges & data stocks fared in Q1.
